## How was this tested?

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all --check` passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings` passes
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace --all-features` passes
- [ ] Regenerated bindings (`rata codegen`) if `#[command]` signatures changed
- [ ] Updated docs and `CHANGELOG.md` (under `[Unreleased]`) if behavior changed
